changes.text: Validate Flow against Spec — deterministic pre-run validation catches missing fields, bad captures, and data flow issues
Ideas Generation Trace — inspect how AI generates test ideas (pattern, spec context, prompts)
Flow generation now correctly resolves spec files (was showing 0 files due to case mismatch)
Independent idea folder hierarchy — folders are decoupled from spec file structure
Generate Ideas modal with pattern selection (Random, CRUD, Errors, etc.)
Standardized button colors and UI consistency across all pages
